sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْكَرَمُ مِنْ أَهَمِّ الصِّفَاتِ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo se smatra jednom od najvažnijih osobina u arapskoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is considered one of the most important qualities in Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَقْبِلُ النَّاسُ ضُيُوفَهُمْ بِحَفَاوَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ وَيُقَدِّمُونَ لَهُمُ الْقَهْوَةَ وَالتَّمْرَ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi dočekuju svoje goste s velikom toplinom i nude im kafu i hurme.
sentences.translationEn: People welcome their guests with great warmth and offer them coffee and dates.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الْعَرَبُ إِكْرَامَ الضَّيْفِ وَيَشْعُرُونَ بِالسَّعَادَةِ عِنْدَمَا يَزُورُهُمْ شَخْصٌ مَا.
sentences.translation: Arapi vole ukazivati počast gostu i osjećaju se sretno kada ih neko posjeti.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs love honoring guests and feel happy when someone visits them.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ تَعْكِسُ رُوحَ الْمَحَبَّةِ وَالتَّعَاوُنِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj običaj odražava duh ljubavi i saradnje među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: This custom reflects the spirit of love and cooperation among people.
